---
title: "02_Infection_spot_detection"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{02_Infection_spot_detection}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```


# Overview

Following background correction, infection-positive spatial locations are identified based on aggregated pathogen-derived expression. ISTtools supports both gene-level and gene-set-based detection strategies to accommodate diverse pathogen types.

---

# Setup

``` r
suppressMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(ISTools)
})
```

---

# Infection signal aggregation (CE)

To improve robustness, pathogen signals are first aggregated across informative features.

```r
high_exp_genes <- GetTopGenes(
  IST_obj,
  top_n = 10,
  pattern = "EmuJ-",
  grp_by_samp = FALSE,
  grp_by_celltype = FALSE,
  assay_id = "Spatial",
  layer_id = "counts"
)

IST_obj <- GetGeneStat(
  IST_obj = IST_obj,
  features = high_exp_genes,
  prefix = "top10_gene",
  func = "sum"
)
```

---

# Spot classification (CE)

```r
IST_obj <- SpotDetect_Gene(
  IST_obj,
  features = high_exp_genes,
  feature_colnm = grep("all_gene", colnames(IST_obj@meta.data), value = TRUE),
  PosThres_prob = 0,
  PosThres_count = 3,
  col = COLOR_DIS_CON,
  black_bg = FALSE,
  pt_size = 1,
  mode_SpatialPlot = "single",
  grp_nm = "CE_correct_after_all_gene_white"
)
```

---

# Viral infection detection (JEV)

For viral datasets, predefined pathogen gene sets are typically used.

```r
pathogen_genes <- c("NS5","C","NS3","NS1","E","Prm","NS4aAlt","NS4bAlt","NS2a","NS2b")

IST_obj <- GetGeneStat(
  IST_obj = IST_obj,
  features = pathogen_genes,
  prefix = "all_gene",
  func = "sum"
)

IST_obj <- SpotDetect_Gene(
  IST_obj,
  features = c("NS5"),
  feature_colnm = grep("all_gene", colnames(IST_obj@meta.data), value = TRUE),
  PosThres_prob = 0,
  PosThres_count = 1,
  pt_size = 0.25,
  mode_SpatialPlot = "single",
  grp_nm = "JEV_correct_before_all_gene_white"
)
```

---

# Remarks

* Aggregation reduces sparsity and stabilizes detection
* Threshold parameters determine classification sensitivity
* Outputs provide binary or probabilistic infection labels for each spot

---

# Session information

```r
sessionInfo()
```
